## How tested

<!-- Which of these did you run, and what did you add?
     - npm run lint / typecheck / test
     - new unit tests (reducer fixtures, adapter mappings, component tests)
     - npm run test:e2e
     - manual: demo mode / real Claude Code session / replay -->

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test` pass locally
- [ ] Tests added or updated for behavior changes
- [ ] No new dependencies (or: discussed in issue #\_\_ first)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under Unreleased (user-visible changes)
- [ ] Screenshots/GIF attached for UI changes (both themes if styling changed)
- [ ] No secrets, real transcripts, or machine-identifying paths in fixtures/recordings
